case_title: VILLAREAL REBECCA VS TARANGO DANIEL G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $540.00 FILED BY VILLAREAL REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT TARANGO DANIEL G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
